case_for: Adams has shown top-end ceiling with a 26-point explosion and a recent 22.1-point performance, and the consensus projection of 22.1 suggests analysts expect a favorable role/volume in this matchup.
case_against: His floor has been shaky with three games under 10 points in the last six weeks, showing real week-to-week inconsistency that could produce a dud below the 12-point threshold.
